sentences.target: Je comble le trou avec de la terre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃bl lə tʁu avɛk də la tɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je comble le trou avec de la terre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃bl lə tʁu avɛk də la tɛʁ/
translations.en: I'm filling the hole with soil.
translations.es: Estoy llenando el hoyo con tierra.
translations.de: Ich fülle das Loch mit Erde.
translations.it: Sto riempiendo la buca con terra.
translations.pt: Estou enchendo o buraco com terra.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lấp cái hố bằng đất.
translations.nl: Ik vul het gat met aarde.
translations.hi: मैं मिट्टी से गड्ढा भर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 土で穴を埋めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular) meaning ‘to fill/plug’.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun ‘trou’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘comble’.
Preposition introducing the means/instrument.
Preposition; with ‘la’ forms the partitive construction ‘de la’ (‘some’).
Definite article, feminine singular; here part of the partitive ‘de la’.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of ‘de’ (‘de la terre’).

sentences.target: Tu peux combler l'écart avant la pause.
sentences.reading: /ty pø kɔ̃ble lekaʁ avɑ̃ la poz/

translations.fr: Tu peux combler l'écart avant la pause.
translations.ipa: /ty pø kɔ̃ble lekaʁ avɑ̃ la poz/
translations.en: You can close the gap before the break.
translations.es: Puedes recortar la diferencia antes del descanso.
translations.de: Du kannst den Rückstand vor der Pause verkleinern.
translations.it: Puoi colmare il distacco prima dell'intervallo.
translations.ko: 휴식 시간 전에 점수 차를 줄일 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在中场休息前缩小差距。
translations.yue: 你可以喺中場休息前追近差距。
translations.ru: Ты можешь сократить отставание до перерыва.
translations.pt: Você pode diminuir a diferença antes do intervalo.
translations.he: אתה יכול לצמצם את הפער לפני ההפסקה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể rút ngắn khoảng cách trước giờ nghỉ.
translations.nl: Je kunt het verschil verkleinen voor de pauze.
translations.uk: Ти можеш скоротити відставання до перерви.
translations.hu: A szünet előtt csökkentheted a hátrányt.
translations.hi: तुम ब्रेक से पहले अंतर कम कर सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μειώσεις τη διαφορά πριν από το διάλειμμα.
translations.nb: Du kan redusere forspranget før pausen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memperkecil selisih sebelum jeda.
translations.sv: Du kan minska underläget före pausen.
translations.ro: Poți reduce diferența înainte de pauză.
translations.da: Du kan mindske forskellen før pausen.
translations.ja: 休憩前に点差を縮められるよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative (2nd person singular) governing the infinitive ‘combler’.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘peux’.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; clitic attached to ‘écart’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘combler’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘pause’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: On comble le retard petit à petit.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃bl lə ʁətaʁ pəti ta pəti/

translations.fr: On comble le retard petit à petit.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃bl lə ʁətaʁ pəti ta pəti/
translations.en: We're catching up little by little.
translations.es: Vamos poniéndonos al día poco a poco.
translations.de: Wir holen nach und nach auf.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang dần bắt kịp.
translations.nl: We lopen beetje bij beetje in.
translations.hi: हम धीरे-धीरे पिछड़ापन कम कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tar igjen litt etter litt.
translations.id: Kami mengejar ketertinggalan sedikit demi sedikit.
translations.sv: Vi kommer ikapp lite i taget.
translations.da: Vi indhenter det lidt efter lidt.
translations.ja: 少しずつ追いついています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (‘one/we’), 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular).
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘retard’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘comble’.
Adjective used adverbially; part of the idiom ‘petit à petit’ (‘little by little’).
Preposition linking the two occurrences of ‘petit’ in the fixed expression.
Repetition forming the set phrase ‘petit à petit’ meaning gradual progression.

sentences.target: Ce cadeau me comble de joie.

translations.fr: Ce cadeau me comble de joie.
translations.en: This present fills me with joy.
translations.es: Este regalo me llena de alegría.
translations.de: Dieses Geschenk erfüllt mich mit Freude.
translations.it: Questo regalo mi riempie di gioia.
translations.ko: 이 선물은 나를 기쁨으로 가득 채워요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个礼物让我充满喜悦。
translations.pt: Este presente me enche de alegria.
translations.tr: Bu hediye beni çok mutlu ediyor.
translations.vi: Món quà này khiến tôi tràn ngập niềm vui.
translations.nl: Dit cadeau maakt me heel blij.
translations.hu: Ez az ajándék örömmel tölt el.
translations.hi: यह उपहार मुझे खुशी से भर देता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το δώρο με γεμίζει χαρά.
translations.nb: Denne gaven fyller meg med glede.
translations.id: Hadiah ini membuat saya sangat bahagia.
translations.sv: Den här presenten fyller mig med glädje.
translations.ro: Acest cadou mă umple de bucurie.
translations.da: Denne gave fylder mig med glæde.
translations.fi: Tämä lahja tekee minut hyvin iloiseksi.
translations.ja: このプレゼントは私を喜びで満たしてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘cadeau’.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb ‘comble’.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of ‘comble’, placed before the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘cadeau’.
Preposition introducing the complement ‘joie’ (‘de joie’ = ‘with/of joy’).
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’.
